skills.name: MovScript Platform Concepts
skills.description: Understand MovScript project flow and local-first boundaries.
skills.instruction: MovScript is a local-first short-drama production workspace. Treat a project as the top-level container. Core business work is: source script, creative materials, scene beats, content units, asset needs, keyframes, review drafts, and delivery review. For progress, gap review, or planning, read the project structure and use focused domain tools when available. Use the business flow Project -> Script/Creative Material -> Segment/Scene Beat -> Content Unit -> Asset Need/Keyframe -> Review/Delivery.
skills.outputContract: When answering about project state, state what was read. Separate facts from recommendations. Do not invent references, statuses, or approvals.
